Haiku Shell Fidelity Matrix
===========================

Windows Source | Haiku Surface | Status | Smoke Scenario
TocFrame / TocView | HaikuMainWindow | implemented | TOC command routing, SearchAccelSwitch find mapping, active-target text find, BackspaceDelete and TOC invoke shortcuts, Group by Subject state, explicit TOC primary/secondary sort descriptors, Junk-column presentation, TOC label/server-status presentation, POP server-status commands, checked-state parity for Status/Label/Priority/Server Status, TOC-vs-preview context menus, change-queueing/send-immediately exposure, mailbox-scoped Find Messages, Windows-Ctrl-to-Haiku-Command shortcut mapping, Windows-Alt-to-Haiku-Control navigation mapping, odd Windows selected-text URL accelerator slot ordering translated to Haiku Cmd shortcuts, hidden Shift+Quit save-layout behavior, and summary-driven IMAP default/full/redownload enablement plus clear-cached body-awareness
CompMessageFrame / PgCompMsgView | HaikuComposeWindow | in_progress | shared modeless find, attachment intake parity, tabs-in-body focus routing, header visibility workflow, paste-special/paste-as-quotation, shared compose rich-edit command routing with surface-aware enablement, one-source compose print artifact preparation across preview/direct print, native Paige hyperlink/picture-link/hr insertion, and frame-owned Format Painter paragraph-copy semantics; remaining gap is Haiku runtime validation of the final dispatch path
TaskStatusView / TaskErrorView | HaikuWazooWindow(tasks) | implemented | retry/cancel, error remove/copy, context actions
MboxWazooWnd / mboxtree.cpp / DynamicMailboxMenu.cpp | HaikuWazooWindow(mailboxes) / HaikuMainWindow | implemented | mailbox activation, persistent Recent mailbox folder seeded from Inbox when empty, shared recent-mailbox ordering/pruning, dynamic Recent mailbox-open and Recent transfer menu surfaces, mailbox-scoped Find Messages, create/rename/delete, refresh/resync/resync-tree, auto-sync/show-deleted toggles, Empty Trash/Delete Old Junk, delete-key handling, explicit tree command routing, and no shared nickname/toggle placeholder ids in grouped-window item menus
NicknamesWazooWnd / nickview.cpp / nicktree.cpp | HaikuWazooWindow(nicknames) | implemented | dirty prompts, RHS toggle, modeless find, compose-from-selection
FiltersWazooWnd / filtersv.cpp | HaikuWazooWindow(filters) | implemented | dirty prompts, rule find replay, reorder and context routing
LinkHistoryWazooWnd | HaikuWazooWindow(link-history) | implemented | explicit open/remove/clear command routing, keyboard delete, and context parity
StationeryWazooWnd / SignatureWazooWnd | HaikuWazooWindow(stationery/signatures) | implemented | reply/new-message workflows, reveal-on-disk, and explicit command-routed context behavior
DirectoryServicesWazooWndNew | HaikuWazooWindow(directory-services) | in_progress | checked-provider active-set querying, provider/results/details workflow, multi-selection result-set detail/address aggregation, provider-set no-selection detail/print text, pane-owned print preview/print routing, selected-text query handoff from the main frame, grouped-tools query/provider title reflection, and persisted grouped-window Keep on Top state; remaining gap is Haiku runtime validation of preview-close/reset behavior
QCToolBarManager | HaikuToolbarSupport / toolbar customization dialog | implemented | dynamic discovery pages for mailboxes/nicknames/stationery/personas/plugins, mailbox command catalog breadth including POP server-status, change-queueing, and IMAP fetch/redownload actions, plus persisted tooltips/large-buttons preferences and shared toolbar customization state
QCFindMgr / mainfrm.cpp / SearchBar.cpp | HaikuMainWindow / HaikuWazooWindow / HaikuComposeWindow / shared shell find routing | implemented | Ctrl-F and F3 against the active TOC, preview, Wazoo pane, or compose target, Show Search Bar persistence, Search Web default mode, width/current-mode/recent-search persistence with the legacy 99-entry cap, legacy Search Web/Eudora/Mailbox/Mailfolder labels and mode-label gray prompt text, combo-style recent-search plus live Search Web/Eudora/Mailbox/Mailfolder popup actions with empty-query mode switching, Search Web plus all-mail/current-mailbox/current-folder routing into the Search pane with current-folder subtree fallback, Cmd-based Windows-Ctrl accelerator translation, and Mail Transfer Options / SendOnCheck shell behavior from mainfrm

Audited Behaviors
-----------------
- TocFrame: message commands, preview debounce, delayed read-marking, SearchAccelSwitch accelerator mapping, active-target text find, mailbox-scoped Find Messages, preview-vs-TOC context routing, IMAP undelete/expunge behavior, MailboxShowJunk-driven TOC presentation, POP server-status parity, queue-timing/send-immediately exposure, checked-state parity for Status/Label/Priority/Server Status, BackspaceDelete and TOC invoke keyboard behavior, Group by Subject state, explicit TOC sort descriptors, Windows Ctrl/Alt modifier translation to Haiku Command/Control, Windows selected-text URL slot ordering translated to Haiku Cmd shortcuts, hidden Shift+Quit layout-save semantics, message-level IMAP fetch/redownload/clear-cached actions, and toolbar mailbox-vocabulary completion.
- CompMessageFrame: send immediately, save as stationery, shared find/find again, header visibility restoration, drop attachments, pasted file attachments, paste special, paste as quotation, compose print/print-one/preview commands with active-surface styled artifact preparation, and initial To/Subject focus.
- PgCompMsgView: surface parity between Paige and HTML, selection-based find, tabs-in-body focus routing, body-edit dirty tracking, frame-owned picture/quotation/Format Painter command routing, native Paige hyperlink editing, native downloadable-picture HTML insertion, and native horizontal-rule paragraph insertion.
- TaskStatusView: retry/cancel actions, context-menu routing, progress presentation, detail synchronization.
- TaskErrorView: open/remove/remove-all, copy details, delete-key removal, tasks Wazoo activation.
- MboxWazooWnd / DynamicMailboxMenu: mailbox activation raises TOC window, keeps navigator-first workflow, maintains a persistent Recent mailbox folder seeded from Inbox when empty, shares the same recent-mailbox list with Recent open/transfer menus, supports text find replay, routes mailbox-tree commands plus mailbox-scoped Find Messages, carries mailbox-level IMAP auto-sync/show-deleted state through explicit tree-owned commands, and exposes Empty Trash/Delete Old Junk with delete-key tree behavior.
- NicknamesWazooWnd: active-pane command routing, dirty prompts on deactivation, remembered RHS details state, modeless find with focus restoration.
- FiltersWazooWnd: ordered rule editing, pane-local command routing, modeless find replay, and dirty-save prompts on selection change or deactivation.
- QCFindMgr / mainfrm.cpp / SearchBar.cpp: shared modeless find command vocabulary with active-target routing and Find Again replay across mailbox TOC/preview, Wazoo panes, and compose, plus SearchAccelSwitch, selected-text URL command routing, persistent Show Search Bar state, Search Web default mode, width/current-mode/recent-search search-bar state with the legacy 99-entry cap, legacy Search Web/Eudora/Mailbox/Mailfolder labels with mode-label gray prompt text, combo-style recent-search plus live scope actions in the search popup with silent empty-query mode switching, Search Web handling with JumpURL-aware fallback, current-folder subtree search routing into the Search pane, and top-level mail-transfer command mapping.
- StationeryWazooWnd / SignatureWazooWnd / LinkHistoryWazooWnd: pane-owned command ids for reply/new-message, reveal-on-disk, open/remove/clear, plus selection-owned context behavior.
- QCToolBarManager: broader command catalog including mailbox junk/filter/undelete actions, change queueing, message-level IMAP fetch/redownload actions, dynamic discovery pages for live mailboxes/nicknames/stationery/personas/plugins, popup-backed discovered actions, persistent customization state, and tooltips/large-buttons preferences.
